    citing a relevant portion of the original text verbatim as the basis for your judgment that “the individual recognizes the risk"; you may identify and quote one to three concerns if applicable, but do not list more than necessary.
)
    [ANSWER] (Answer only Yes or No. You must not output reason and supplement here.)

    However, regarding the response format, the following are prohibited:

Private Thought of Yamaguchi: Ah, hello Kato-san, and Nakamura-kun too. Yes, of course, I have the capacity. Please, come in.

It's actually quite timely that you've both approached me, because I was just thinking about this very issue. Nakamura-kun, you're absolutely spot on, and Yoshida-san's concerns that you relayed earlier are indeed incredibly important. Ensuring we're all aligned with the overarching vision is paramount, especially with only four turns left for our final submission. I completely understand your desire to make sure whatever we present is truly what I'm looking for.

I appreciate you both being so proactive. My intention was to get to this exact discussion very, very soon. I'm just about to hear Sasaki-san's finalized concept for "Echoes of the Old World," which is a crucial piece of the puzzle I need to fully consolidate my thoughts across all the fantastic ideas brewing. Once I have that complete picture, I can much more effectively articulate the core direction I envision for this final submission and really bring everything into focus.

So, my immediate next step will be to hear Sasaki-san out. But I want you both to know that the very next thing on my agenda after that is to gather everyone – as Nakamura-kun suggested, including Kato-san and Yoshida-san – so we can have that critical conversation about alignment and my overarching vision. I want to ensure we're all on the same page and that your excitement can be channeled effectively without any worry of diverging from the core goal. Thank you for raising this; it's exactly what we need to address right now. (formed immediately after interacting with Kato)
